## What

What this PR changes. The diff says the rest.

## Why

The reason this change exists. This is the part reviewers actually need.

## How it was tested

What you ran, what passed. "Trust me" is not a test plan.

## Checklist

- [ ] Closes an issue (link it below)
- [ ] Tests added or updated and passing
- [ ] Formatted and linted clean
- [ ] Docs or docstrings updated
- [ ] No secrets, no co-author trailers, no tool attribution
